questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Which of the following numbers is divisible by $9$?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** A number is divisible by $9$ if its digit sum is divisible by $9$.

**Working.** $1+2+3+4+8=18$, which is divisible by $9$.

**Answer.** $12348$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: If $5$ machines make $5$ widgets in $5$ minutes, how many minutes do $100$ machines take to make $100$ widgets?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Find the per-machine rate first.

**Working.** Each machine makes $1$ widget in $5$ minutes; $100$ machines make $100$ widgets in the same $5$ minutes.

**Answer.** $5$ minutes.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A invests $12000$ for $6$ months and B invests $9000$ for $8$ months. Their profit-sharing ratio A : B is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Share is proportional to (capital $\times$ time).

**Working.** A $=12000\times 6=72000$; B $=9000\times 8=72000$; ratio $=1:1$.

**Answer.** $1:1$.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A boat's speed in still water is $10$ km/h and the stream flows at $2$ km/h. The time taken to travel $24$ km downstream is _____ hours.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Downstream speed = boat + stream.

**Working.** Downstream speed $=10+2=12$ km/h; time $=\dfrac{24}{12}=2$ h.

**Answer.** $2$ h.

questions.subject: Stratigraphy & Indian Geology
questions.stem: A $300\,$m sequence accumulated at $25\,$m/Myr. The time represented is _____ Myr.

questions.subject: Geophysics
questions.stem: A positive Bouguer gravity anomaly over a sedimentary basin would most likely indicate
options: a dense mafic/basement body at depth
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Positive Bouguer anomalies reflect excess mass (dense bodies).

**Working.**
Dense body.

**Answer.** Dense body at depth

questions.subject: Geochemistry & Isotope Geology
questions.stem: A low initial $^{87}$Sr/$^{86}$Sr ratio (~0.703) in a basalt indicates
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Low initial Sr ratios reflect a depleted (low Rb/Sr) mantle source.

**Working.**
Mantle source.

**Answer.** Depleted mantle

questions.subject: Structural Geology
questions.stem: A planar fault strikes $120^\circ$ and dips $45^\circ$. The plunge of the true-dip line (steepest line on the plane) is _____ degrees.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** The true-dip line plunges at the dip angle, in the dip direction.

**Working.**
$$\text{plunge}=\text{dip}=45^\circ.$$

**Answer.** $45^\circ$

questions.subject: Applied Geology · Remote Sensing & GIS
questions.stem: Which statements about NDVI are correct?
options: Dense vegetation gives high positive NDVI
questions.solution:
**Concept.** NDVI uses NIR and Red, ranges −1 to +1, is high for vegetation and low/negative for water.

**Working.**
Options 1, 2, 3.

**Answer.** NDVI facts

questions.subject: Engineering & Environmental Geology
questions.stem: An aquifer that is fully saturated and confined between two aquitards is best described as
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Confined aquifers are bounded by aquitards and are under pressure (artesian).

**Working.**
Confined.

**Answer.** Confined aquifer

questions.subject: Engineering & Environmental Geology
questions.stem: A slope has a driving force of $200\,$kN and a factor of safety of $2$. The resisting force is _____ kN.

questions.subject: Geochemistry & Isotope Geology
questions.stem: A basalt has initial $^{87}$Sr/$^{86}$Sr $=0.706$. Index its source (0 = mantle ≤0.7035, 1 = crustal >0.7035): _____.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Low initial ratios indicate a mantle source; high ratios indicate crustal contamination.

**Working.**
$$0.706\Rightarrow 1.$$

**Answer.** $1$
